/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock_main.so.1.16.0 -o ../../../../../../../lib/libgmock_main.so.1.16.0 CMakeFiles/gmock_main.dir/src/gmock_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/masterthesis/kaixi_crospi_ws/build/etasl_wrapper/lib ../../../../../../../lib/libgmock.so.1.16.0 ../../../../../../../lib/libgtest.so.1.16.0
